name: IS THE ALCHEMIST

placement_conditions: If the Alchemist has a not-in-play Minion ability, mark the Alchemist with the IS THE ALCHEMIST reminder and swap the Alchemist token with this Minion token and turn it upside down.

name: NO ABILITY
placement_conditions: The Artist loses their ability - mark them with the NO ABILITY reminder.

name: KNOW
placement_conditions: When preparing the first night, mark any player with the KNOW reminder.

name: HAS ABILITY

placement_conditions: If the Banshee is killed by the Demon, place the HAS ABILITY reminder token next to the Banshee and say “The Banshee has awoken” or something similarly dramatic.

name: KNOW
placement_conditions: Mark one evil player with the KNOW reminder.

name: LUNCH

placement_conditions: If a good player dies by execution, mark them with the LUNCH reminder, and remove the Cannibal’s POISONED reminder if necessary.
removal_timing: If a good player dies by execution, mark them with the LUNCH reminder, and remove the Cannibal’s POISONED reminder if necessary.

placement_conditions: If a good player dies by execution, mark them with the LUNCH reminder, and remove the Cannibal’s POISONED reminder if necessary.
removal_timing: If a good player dies by execution, mark them with the LUNCH reminder, and remove the Cannibal’s POISONED reminder if necessary.

name: DRUNK 1
placement_conditions: Tonight, mark them with the Courtier’s DRUNK 1 reminder.

name: DRUNK 2
placement_conditions: The next night, replace the DRUNK 1 reminder with the DRUNK 2 reminder.

name: DRUNK 3
placement_conditions: The next night, replace the DRUNK 2 reminder with the DRUNK 3 reminder.

name: NO ABILITY
placement_conditions: At dusk on the next night, remove the DRUNK 3 reminder, and the Courtier loses their ability—mark them with the NO ABILITY reminder and remove their night token from the night sheet.
removal_timing: At dusk on the next night, remove the DRUNK 3 reminder, and the Courtier loses their ability—mark them with the NO ABILITY reminder and remove their night token from the night sheet.

name: CHOSEN
placement_conditions: Mark the chosen player’s character token with the CHOSEN reminder.

removal_timing: Each dawn, mark the Flowergirl with the DEMON NOT VOTED reminder, and remove the DEMON VOTED reminder, if any.

removal_timing: Each dawn, mark the Flowergirl with the DEMON NOT VOTED reminder, and remove the DEMON VOTED reminder, if any.

name: NO ABILITY
placement_conditions: Either way, the Fool loses their ability—mark them with the NO ABILITY reminder.

name: RED HERRING

placement_conditions: If the chosen player is a different character from the chosen character icon, the Gambler dies—mark them with the DEAD reminder.

name: DEAD
placement_conditions: Each day, if the Gossip makes a definite, true public statement, put the Gossip’s DEAD reminder in the center of the left side of the Grimoire as a reminder to yourself to place it tonight.

name: GRANDCHILD
placement_conditions: During the first night, wake the Grandmother and show them the character token marked GRANDCHILD, then point at the Grandchild player, then put the Grandmother to sleep.

name: DEAD
placement_timing: If the Demon kills the Grandchild,
placement_conditions: If the Demon kills the Grandchild, the Grandmother dies - mark them with the DEAD reminder.

removal_timing: The Huntsman loses their ability—mark them with the NO ABILITY reminder and remove their night token from the night sheet.

removal_timing: At dawn, remove the SAFE reminders.

name: DRUNK
placement_conditions: One of the chosen players becomes drunk—mark them with the DRUNK reminder.
removal_timing: At dusk, remove the DRUNK reminder.

placement_conditions: While preparing the first night, put the Investigator's MINION reminder token by any Minion character token, and put the Investigator's WRONG reminder token by any other character token.

name: WRONG
placement_conditions: While preparing the first night, put the Investigator's MINION reminder token by any Minion character token, and put the Investigator's WRONG reminder token by any other character token.

name: KNOW
placement_conditions: During setup, mark two non-Demon players with the Knight’s KNOW reminders.

name: OUTSIDER
placement_conditions: While preparing the first night, put the Librarian's OUTSIDER reminder token by any Outsider character token, and put the Librarian's WRONG reminder token by any other character token.

placement_conditions: While preparing the first night, put the Librarian's OUTSIDER reminder token by any Outsider character token, and put the Librarian's WRONG reminder token by any other character token.

placement_timing: If the chosen player is good,
placement_conditions: If the chosen player is good, that player dies—mark them with the Lycanthrope’s DEAD reminder.

name: DEAD
placement_conditions: During the night, if the Mayor would die, you choose if the Mayor actually dies, or if the Mayor remains alive and another character dies instead—put the Demon's DEAD reminder token by that character token instead of the Mayor, and put a shroud on that character token instead of the Mayor.

name: EVERYONE IS DRUNK
placement_conditions: During the day, if a Minion dies by execution, all other players except Travellers become drunk—put the Minstrel’s EVERYONE IS DRUNK reminder in the center of the left side of the Grimoire.
removal_timing: At dusk tomorrow, all players made drunk by the Minstrel become sober—remove the EVERYONE IS DRUNK reminder.

removal_timing: At dawn, remove the SAFE reminder token.

placement_conditions: (Do not mark them with the Demon's DEAD reminder token or add a shroud as you normally would.) At dawn, declare that no one died at night.

removal_timing: The Nightwatchman loses their ability – mark them with a NO ABILITY reminder and remove their night token from the night sheet.

placement_timing: If they pointed to an icon of a character in play,
placement_conditions: If they pointed to an icon of a character in play, the player of the chosen character becomes drunk - mark them with the DRUNK reminder.

placement_conditions: If the Townsfolk marked MAD dies, and you feel that the Pixie player has been sufficiently mad that they were this character, replace the MAD reminder with the HAS ABILITY reminder.

placement_conditions: If the Princess nominates and executes a player, mark the Demon with the DOESN'T KILL reminder.
